Class Debug

java.lang.Object
utils.Debug
public class Debug extends Object
Custom logging utility to handle debug output. Priority levels: 0: Disabled / Critical only 1: Warnings only 2: Important alerts 3: Low severity / general info

  • Method Details

    • setDebug

      public static void setDebug(boolean state)

    • setDebug

      public static void setDebug(boolean state, int level)
      Enables or disables debugging and sets the minimum priority level.
      Parameters:
      state - true to enable, false to disable.
      level - The verbosity level (1=Warnings, 2=Alerts, 3=All Info).

    • setDebugPriority

      public static void setDebugPriority(int level)
